Name: FBasedMovementInfo
Description: Struct to hold information about the "base" object the character is standing on.

Variables.Name: BoneName
Variables.Description: Bone name on component, for skeletal meshes. NAME_None if not a skeletal mesh or if bone is invalid.

Variables.Name: Location
Variables.Description: Location relative to MovementBase. Only valid if HasRelativeLocation() is true.

Variables.Name: Rotation
Variables.Description: Rotation: relative to MovementBase if HasRelativeRotation() is true, absolute otherwise.

Variables.Name: bServerHasBaseComponent
Variables.Description: Whether the server says that there is a base. On clients, the component may not have resolved yet.

Variables.Name: bRelativeRotation
Variables.Description: Whether rotation is relative to the base or absolute. It can only be relative if location is also relative.

Variables.Name: bServerHasVelocity
Variables.Description: Whether there is a velocity on the server. Used for forcing replication when velocity goes to zero.
